name: Rippling
tagline: All-in-one HR, IT, and finance platform
description: Rippling is a workforce management platform that unifies HR, IT, and finance operations. Unlike Deel or Gusto which focus on payroll, Rippling also manages employee devices, app provisioning, and benefits in one system.
cons: Can be expensive for small teams
use_cases: You want to automatically provision and deprovision SaaS apps and laptops the moment someone joins or leaves
Your HR team is drowning in manual onboarding steps across payroll, IT, and benefits that could be automated
You're scaling from 20 to 200 employees and need HR, payroll, and device management to grow together
You want a single source of truth for headcount planning that connects org structure to finance and IT systems
